sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, interval_col INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, interval_col) VALUES (1, to_microseconds(10));
UPDATE test_table SET interval_col = to_microseconds(20) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, interval_col FROM test_table WHERE interval_col > to_microseconds(5);
SELECT id, interval_col, (interval_col + to_microseconds(5)) AS new_interval FROM test_table;
